# HELP dh_slots_total Total VM slots.
# TYPE dh_slots_total gauge
dh_slots_total 8
# HELP dh_slots_busy Busy VM slots.
# TYPE dh_slots_busy gauge
dh_slots_busy 5
# HELP dh_jobs_completed_total Completed fork/exec jobs.
# TYPE dh_jobs_completed_total counter
dh_jobs_completed_total 1432
# HELP dh_fork_restore_seconds Fork-restore latency.
# TYPE dh_fork_restore_seconds histogram
dh_fork_restore_seconds_bucket{le="0.05"} 210
dh_fork_restore_seconds_bucket{le="0.1"} 340
dh_fork_restore_seconds_bucket{le="0.5"} 400
dh_fork_restore_seconds_bucket{le="+Inf"} 412
dh_fork_restore_seconds_sum 31.5
dh_fork_restore_seconds_count 412
# HELP dh_determinism_failures_total Divergences detected by the hypervisor.
# TYPE dh_determinism_failures_total counter
dh_determinism_failures_total 0
